Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 150 

SUBMTG_STATE_CD 

LABEL: Submitting State Entity Code 

DESCRIPTION: The numeric state code for the U.S. state, territory, or the District of Columbia that has submitted the 
data. 

SHORT NAME: SUBMTG_STATE_CD 

LONG NAME: SUBMTG_STATE_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

FILE(S): All annual provider files 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: FIPS state codes can
